# CWE-915: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-915-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Profile struct {
	ID      uint
	Name    string
	Role    string
	Balance int
}

// Safe: only explicitly allowed attributes may be updated from client input.
func UpdateProfile(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var body struct {
		Name string `json:"name"`
	}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	db.Model(&Profile{}).Where("id = ?", id).Update("name", body.Name)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
